title: Brunson Impact Mapper
lede: Analyse Jalen Brunson's recent form to project his next scoring band, and see how his offensive output influences the Knicks' likelihood of winning.

sections.title: Win Likelihood by Scoring Band
sections.description: Historical relationship between Brunson's points total and Knicks match outcomes.

sections.title: Recent Scoring Form
sections.description: Brunson's points total over the last 10 games used to calculate the predicted band.

sections.title: How This Is Calculated
sections.body: The predicted scoring band is calculated using a baseline of Brunson's last 10 games, adjusted for home/away splits and opponent defensive rating. Win likelihood maps those projected points against historical team outcomes. No black-box algorithms—just transparent, historical behaviour.

demoSteps: Review the Highlights to see the baseline prediction for the upcoming match.
Check the 'Win Likelihood by Scoring Band' table to understand how crucial Brunson's output is for a team win.
Analyse the 'Recent Scoring Form' series to see the raw data driving the prediction.
notes: Ensure all data flows strictly from local JSON fixtures to guarantee the demo works offline.
Keep the interface clean; avoid adding decorative elements that distract from the core data relationships.
Future iteration will include a matchup dependency view across the next 5 fixtures.
